reviews.review_description: I had the pleasure of working with Fernando on a recent VR project where his skills as a Technical Artist were pivotal. He successfully transformed extremely complex technical challenges into a user experience that feels fluid and deceptively simple. I believe we need more products like this that fill the gap between artistic vision and engineering rigor.

developer_response.body:
Thanks man!
It was a pleasure collaborating with you :)

reviews.review_title: 🦋 Peaceful Escape in a Japanese Garden!
reviews.review_description:
Epic Zen Garden offers a relaxing and meditative VR experience where you can peacefully wander through a beautifully designed Japanese garden. Choose your preferred time of day or enjoy the serene black-and-white mode for a more artistic touch.

Interact with your surroundings — start the fountain to watch dozens of butterflies take flight as enchanting background music fills the air. A simple yet deeply calming experience, perfect for unwinding and re-centering your mind. 🌸

This is not a game, it is a chill little experience where you can explore a garden and interact with various objects inside the garden e.g. you can interact with the fish ponds and Koi carps swim toward you. 🙂 For me a nice experience for example to show VR to friends who never experienced VR before.

I need to be able to walk freely in places  not Teleporting everywhere.  Need to be able to enter the house also.  We need to be able to play sounds or tunes from our library if possible.  The floating rock  is deffo out of place should be static like all the others.  Maybe add a way to feed the koi carp ?  Just a few things I would certainly like to see change in this.  Maybe a setting menu for changing these issues?  Which is why I'm only giving 3 stars.

developer_response.body:
On it!
Thanks for your suggestion

reviews.review_description: The interactions and environment generally look and sound nice and are pretty relaxing, but i did notice a few visual bugs. Free movement should be added as well. Clean those up, maybe add an interior, and youve got a nice little app for the price
A peaceful and beautiful environment, true to name , a zen garden. Looking forward to seeing more of your work and your future updates.
Nice work i hope you can update it.
